title: dryopteris geropogon
intro: Dryopteris geropogon, also known as the scaly male fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris geropogon include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and improve respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
